steps.title: Count the extra days
steps.content: The first day costs $104$ dollars. If the rental lasts $d$ days, then the number of additional days is $d-1$, and each additional day costs $52$ dollars.

steps.title: Write the cost function
steps.content:
Add the first-day cost and the additional-day cost:
$$
C(d)=104+52(d-1)
$$
$$
C(d)=104+52d-52=52d+52
$$

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: The function is $C(d)=52d+52$. The answer is A.
